title: How to Make DIY Micropipette
author: Umair Masood awan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A micropipette is a precision laboratory instrument used to accurately measure and transfer small volumes of liquid, typically ranging from 0.1 µL to 1000 µL. It consists of a plunger, volume adjustment dial, and a disposable tip to prevent contamination. Micropipettes are essential in molecular biology, biochemistry, and medical labs for tasks like PCR, sample preparation, and reagent dispensing. They come in fixed or adjustable volume models and require proper calibration and technique to ensure accuracy.
